name: no_moon.jar
description: You heard about— yeah, we get it. This time you tried "no_moon.jar", the mod that is inspired by The Broken Script. The no_moon.jar mod is a horror mod that slowly corrupts your world and slowly turns everything chaotic. The moon will slowly start to disappear and chaos will come. Entities will start spawning and this mod will have you on the edge of your seat, as they wait for the perfect time to strike.
creator: Luanptb
